challenge_reason: Playwright MCP events = 101 (25.6% of tool_use). Pure BUILD sessions have <5% Playwright. Session spans three distinct phases: AWB feature build, Playwright visual audit of all Signal Studio pages, and design exploration (17 AWB landing page variants + AppyStack recipe formalisation). Registry single-label BUILD captures only the first phase.

phases.name: AWB Integration Build
phases.summary: Built AWB integration: renamed env var to AWB_URL, implemented POST /api/moments/:id/send-to-awb endpoint, fixed buildPoemPayload() for incidents, resolved EADDRINUSE port conflict

phases.name: Playwright UI Audit
phases.summary: 42 Playwright screenshots across all Signal Studio pages. Fixed: incident list column widths (dropped Company/Reporter), normalised 'new incident' badge/button colours to brand palette, various style edits driven by visual feedback

phases.name: Design Exploration — AWB Landing Variants
phases.summary: Resumed via compaction. Screenshotted 17 AWB mock landing pages (V1–V17). Updated AWB workflow step indicator to V10 Pipeline style. Agent sub-calls produced design preference write-up and AppyStack recipe formalisation (5 archetypes: Split, Tiles, Minimal, Compact, Hero)

notable_events.description: Very long user_prompt containing compaction summary (~700 lines). Detectable by prefix 'This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context.'
Two Agent tool invocations spawning sub-agents. Companion agent-*.jsonl files expected with isSidechain: true

notes: High-interest session for AngelEye pattern library. Demonstrates: (1) multi-phase sessions that require multi-label classification, (2) Playwright MCP volume as a UI_REVIEW signal, (3) detectable compaction_resume events, (4) voice-to-text noise patterns, (5) long autonomous blocks (6.5h gap with no user prompts during Playwright audit). BUILD label from registry is accurate but incomplete.
